cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Richard could have gone to the basketball court. The question says that the basketball court was closed after 8pm, so we know he has to be there before that. First, let me list out all the known times Richard was doing other things. He woke up at 5am. Then Elizabeth saw him at the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 5am to 7am. So between 5 and 7 am, he was taking photos there. That means he couldn't go to the basketball court during that time. Next, Lisa saw Richard at the electronic store fixing their computer from 3pm to 7pm. So he was there all afternoon until 7pm. So again, he's occupied from 3pm to 7pm. That time frame is probably when the store is open,
